title: HTML autoescape mechanism should not be globally disabled
description: Ensure that the global configuration of the autoescape mechanism is not disabled.

noncompliant.description: Global autoescape is disabled in the Django settings

compliant.description: Global autoescape is enabled in the Django settings

why_is_this_an_issue: Disabling the global autoescape mechanism can lead to cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks.
how_to_fix: Re-enable the global autoescape mechanism in the Django settings.

metadata.title: HTML autoescape mechanism should not be globally disabled
